full_bio: I’m Tenath Dilusha from Sri Lanka—a Computer Science and Engineering student who loves AI, machine learning, and building full-stack applications. I scored 3As at A/Ls with a 2.4649 Z-score, district rank 20, and island rank 266. I code in Python, C++, Java, and work with React, Node.js, and Next.js. Projects include MoneyMap (AI personal finance), a Sri Lanka tourism chatbot, and a coconut detection system using computer vision. I’m learning deep learning with PyTorch, system design, and scalable backend development. I play chess (FIDE 1600+), enjoy self-improvement books, and aim to become an AI/ML engineer building impactful real-world systems.

Name’s Tenath. I’m a CS&E student from Sri Lanka, passionate about AI/ML and full-stack development. I earned 3As at A/Ls (Z-score 2.4649, district rank 20, island rank 266). I build with Python, C++, Java, React, Node.js, and Next.js, and I’ve shipped projects like MoneyMap, a tourism chatbot, and a coconut detection CV system. I learn by building, focus on discipline and consistency, play chess (FIDE 1600+), and want to create large-scale intelligent systems that solve real problems.

I’m Tenath—a fast-learning, adaptable CS student from Sri Lanka who loves combining AI with practical applications. I have strong foundations (3As A/Ls, top ranks), code across Python/C++/Java and modern web stacks, and build real-world projects like MoneyMap and computer vision systems. I read self-improvement books, play chess competitively, and push myself to improve through hands-on projects and continuous learning.
